name: gsb-ai-data-driven-case06-regex-job-poc
description: Case 06: Regex log parsing - S3 text source with regex extraction to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 Text Source - case06_regex","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"value","Type":"string"}]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case06_regex/"],"QuoteChar":"disabled","Recurse":true,"Separator":"tab","WithHeader":false}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT TO_DATE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '([0-3][0-9]\\\\.[0-9][0-9]\\\\.[0-9]{4})', 1), 'dd.MM.yyyy') AS TRANS_DATE, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '([0-2][0-9]:[0-5][0-9]:[0-5][0-9])', 1) AS TRANS_TIME, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '\\\\[([0-9.]+)\\\\]', 1) AS IP_ADDRESS, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '\\\\] (/[^ ]+)', 1) AS URL, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '(\\\\d+) ms', 1) AS RESPONSE_TIME, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, 'P: ([^ ]+)', 1) AS USER_ID, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, 'CID IN \\\\(([^)]+)\\\\)', 1) AS CID, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, 'ACN = ([0-9]+)', 1) AS CIF, CASE WHEN value LIKE '%ERROR%' OR value LIKE '%java%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ERROR_FLAG, value AS LOG_TXT, TO_DATE('20260408', 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(value)) > 0 AND (value LIKE '%SELECT CID, ODACN FROM DEPODP WHERE CID IN%' OR value LIKE '%WHERE CIF.ACN =%')"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case06_regex","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case06_regex/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
